---
title: "Susan Esther Wordsworth"
---

## Susan Esther Wordsworth

**Dates:** (1841/2-1894)

**Maiden name:** (Coxe)

### Description

first wife of the Rt. Rev. [[person:1567]John Wordsworth]

### Biography

She was the daughter of the Rev. [[person:377]Henry Octavius Coxe].

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 17th 1893
- Letter from Jan 29th [l887-1889[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
